pageContext.name: Satoru Gojo (0 Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are excited to present a 1:8 scale figure from Jujutsu Kaisen 0, Satoru Gojo!  Satoru Gojo from Jujutsu Kaisen 0 comes to life in a 1:8 scale figure prepared for battle with his striking eyes peering out from underneath his bandages. The Jujutsu teacher stands at 8.86' tall and is seen wearing his all-black high-necked jacket with matching pants and dark-dressed boots.  Be sure to add this Satoru Gojo Collectible Statue to Jujutsu Kaisen collection today!
